# Serverless / Edge 架构面试题

> 模拟真实面试场景，训练对 Serverless 和 Edge 的思考与表达。

---


## 一、基础题

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q1" title="1. 什么是 Serverless？它和传统服务器架构的主要区别是什么？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuWumuS5ieWHhuehruaAp++8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7kuI7kvKDnu5/mnrbmnoTlr7nmr5TvvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5LyY57y654K55YiG5p6Q77yINDAl77yJPC9saT4KPC91bD4K" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q2" title="2. Edge 计算是什么？它适合哪些前端场景？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuWfuuacrOamguW/te+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7lnLrmma/opobnm5bvvIg0MCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5Zy65pmv5Y6f55CG6Kej6YeK77yIMzAl77yJPC9saT4KPC91bD4K" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q3" title="3. 什么是冷启动？Serverless 冷启动的原因和缓解方案？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuWGt+WQr+WKqOWOn+WboOino+mHiu+8iDQwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7nvJPop6Pmlrnms5XvvIg0MCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5LiN5ZCM5bmz5Y+w5beu5byC77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPC91bD4K" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q4" title="4. 什么是 JAMStack？它和 Serverless / Edge 有什么关系？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPkpBTVN0YWNrIOWumuS5ieWSjOe7hOaIkOmDqOWIhu+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7kuI4gU2VydmVybGVzcyDnmoTlhbPns7vvvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5LyY5Yq/5LiO5bGA6ZmQ77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPuS7o+eggeekuuS+i++8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjwvdWw+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q5" title="5. 对比 Vercel Edge Functions、Cloudflare Workers、AWS Lambda@Edge 的异同。" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPui/kOihjOaXtuW3ruW8gu+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7nlJ/mgIHlkozpm4bmiJDvvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5oCn6IO95ZKM6ZmQ5Yi277yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPumAgueUqOWcuuaZr+aOqOiNkO+8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjwvdWw+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

## 二、进阶题

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q6" title="6. 如何在 Edge 上实现 SSR（Server-Side Rendering）？架构如何设计？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPlNTUiDmtYHnqIvnkIbop6PvvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+RWRnZSBTU1Ig5p625p6E6K6+6K6h77yIMzAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPue8k+WtmOWSjOaAp+iDveS8mOWMlu+8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7ku6PnoIHlrp7njrDvvIgyMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8L3VsPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q7" title="7. 如何在边缘层实现用户认证和授权？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuiupOivgea1geeoi+iuvuiuoe+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT5Ub2tlbiDpqozor4HmnLrliLbvvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+57yT5a2Y5ZKM5oCn6IO9562W55Wl77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPuWuieWFqOaAp+iAg+mHj++8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjwvdWw+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q8" title="8. 全球部署的边缘应用如何设计数据存储和同步策略？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuaVsOaNruWIhuWxguiuvuiuoe+8iDI1Je+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7lkIzmraXnrZbnlaXvvIgyNSXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5LiA6Ie05oCn5ZKM5bu26L+f5p2D6KGh77yIMjUl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPuaVhemanOaBouWkje+8iDI1Je+8iTwvbGk+CjwvdWw+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q9" title="9. 边缘函数有哪些常见的架构模式和设计模式？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuaooeW8j+enjeexu+imhueblu+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7mr4/np43mqKHlvI/ljp/nkIblkozpgILnlKjlnLrmma/vvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5oCn6IO96ICD6YeP77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPue7hOWQiOS9v+eUqO+8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjwvdWw+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q10" title="10. 如何在边缘层实现 A/B 测试和灰度发布系统？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuezu+e7n+iuvuiuoe+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7mtYHph4/liIbphY3nrpfms5XvvIgyMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5oyH5qCH6YeH6ZuG77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPuWunuaXtuWIh+aNouiDveWKm++8iDE1Je+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7ku6PnoIHlrp7njrDvvIgxNSXvvIk8L2xpPgo8L3VsPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q11" title="11. ISR、SSR、SSG 在 Edge 架构中的区别和适用场景？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuS4ieenjeaooeW8j+WumuS5ieWSjOWOn+eQhu+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7lr7nmr5TliIbmnpDvvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+6YCC55So5Zy65pmv5Yik5pat77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPkVkZ2Ug5LyY5YyW77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPC91bD4K" answerBase64="" />

WebAssembly 在 Edge 计算中有什么应用？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPldlYkFzc2VtYmx5IOWfuuehgO+8iDMwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7lupTnlKjlnLrmma/vvIgzMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+6ZuG5oiQ5pa55byP77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPuaAp+iDveWvueavlO+8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjwvdWw+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

## 三、高级题

<InterviewCard id="serverless-edge-interview-q14" title="14. 设计一个多云/多平台的边缘架构，避免供应商锁定。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuaKveixoeWxguiuvuiuoe+8iDI1Je+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7lubPlj7DpgILphY3vvIgyMCXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5pWw5o2u6L+B56e7562W55Wl77yIMjAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPui/kOe7tOWSjOmDqOe9su+8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7miJDmnKzogIPph4/vvIgxNSXvvIk8L2xpPgo8L3VsPgo=" answerBase64="" />

Serverless / Edge 架构下的成本优化策略。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7or4TliIbnu7TluqY8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJo8L3A+Cjx1bD4KPGxpPuiuoei0ueaooeWei+eQhuino++8iDI1Je+8iTwvbGk+CjxsaT7miJDmnKzmnoTmiJDliIbmnpDvvIgyNSXvvIk8L2xpPgo8bGk+5LyY5YyW562W55Wl77yIMzAl77yJPC9saT4KPGxpPuaIkOacrOebkeaOp++8iDIwJe+8iTwvbGk+CjwvdWw+Cg==" answerBase64="" />
